rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §28.052 governs the Texas Advanced Placement Incentive Program and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The purpose of the Texas Advanced Placement Incentive Program is to recognize and reward those students, teachers, and schools that demonstrate success in achieving the state's educational goals.
_note: Rule text concerns AP incentive program; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
